style.description: Style preset. Required in custom parameter mode.

title.description: Song title. Required in custom parameter mode.

lyrics.description: Exact lyrics. Only allowed when extending uploaded audio in custom parameter mode.

prompt.description: Extension brief. Cannot be combined with lyrics.

task_id.description: Source task ID to extend. Provide one of task_id, audio_id, audio_url, or upload_url.

audio_id.description: Source audio ID to extend. Provide one of task_id, audio_id, audio_url, or upload_url.

audio_url.description: Source audio URL to extend. Provide one of task_id, audio_id, audio_url, or upload_url.

upload_url.description: Uploaded source audio URL to extend. Provide one of task_id, audio_id, audio_url, or upload_url.

continue_at.description: Seconds into the source to continue from. Required in custom parameter mode.

parameter_mode.description: Inherit the source track's parameters (source) or supply custom ones (custom).
